summary: Iteration 19 testing complete. All new features verified: Equipment trash (soft delete/restore/permanent delete) and enhanced ticket workflow with new statuses (ordering, delivering, insurance, replaced, reimbursed, obsolete). Backend: 12/12 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified working correctly.

equipment_trash.DELETE /api/equipment/{id}: PASS - Soft delete moves equipment to trash collection
equipment_trash.GET /api/equipment-trash: PASS - Returns list of trashed items with deleted_at, deleted_by info
equipment_trash.POST /api/equipment-trash/{id}/restore: PASS - Restores item to main inventory
equipment_trash.Frontend Corbeille tab: PASS - Shows badge count, deleted items with Restaurer and permanent delete buttons
equipment_trash.Frontend delete confirmation: PASS - Shows 'Déplacer cet équipement dans la corbeille ?'
equipment_trash.Frontend delete toast: PASS - Shows 'Équipement déplacé dans la corbeille'

enhanced_ticket_workflow.Message history: PASS - Each update adds message to history array

frontend_ticket_modal.Status dropdown options: PASS - Shows: En attente, Commande lancée, En cours de livraison, Assurance prend le relais
frontend_ticket_modal.Closure buttons: PASS - Shows 3 buttons: Matériel remplacé et inventorié, Remboursement de l'assurance, Obsolète (ne pas remplacer)
frontend_ticket_modal.Clôturer le ticket section: PASS - Section visible with quick closure buttons

url_tab_parameter.?tab=alertes: PASS - Opens Alertes tab directly when URL contains ?tab=alertes

critical_code_review_comments: Equipment trash feature well implemented with soft delete pattern
Trash items preserve deleted_at, deleted_by, deleted_by_name metadata
Enhanced ticket workflow supports full lifecycle: pending → ordering → delivering → insurance → (replaced|reimbursed|obsolete)
resolved_at timestamp correctly set for all closure statuses (replaced, reimbursed, obsolete)
Frontend Corbeille tab shows badge count and proper restore/delete UI
Ticket modal has both status dropdown and quick closure buttons for better UX
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test equipment and tickets during pytest runs. Existing trash item 'BLACK 7' used for UI verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Equipment trash feature fully functional at /api/equipment-trash endpoints. Enhanced ticket workflow supports statuses: pending, ordering, delivering, insurance, replaced, reimbursed, obsolete. Closure statuses (replaced, reimbursed, obsolete) set resolved_at. Frontend Corbeille tab at /admin/equipment shows trash items. Ticket update modal has status dropdown and 3 quick closure buttons. URL parameter ?tab=alertes opens Alertes tab directly.
